visualizations.title: Percentage of a Number Formula
visualizations.description: The algebraic model to find the value of a percentage of a quantity.

steps.explanation: Convert the percentage to its decimal or fractional value.
Multiply that value by the whole quantity to find the corresponding part.

visualizations.title: Bar Model of 20% of 80
visualizations.description: Dividing the whole (80) into 5 equal columns shows that 20% corresponds to exactly 16.
